# Volume2

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Volume2;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Volume2 { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
music, sound, speaker

## Categories
connectivity, communication, multimedia

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/volume-2)
